sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for West Hollywood, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: launch window and pricing patience. Primary keyword: West Hollywood housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: West Hollywood housing market; West Hollywood real estate market update; West Hollywood home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in West Hollywood; West Hollywood home selling market; West Hollywood homes for sale inventory; West Hollywood days on market; West Hollywood listing price; West Hollywood seller market; West Hollywood housing market 2026; West Hollywood market update sellers; West Hollywood median home price; are home prices dropping in West Hollywood; is now a good time to sell in West Hollywood. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
